    WaitingListController.getWaitingListTable()

  • Uses of WaitingListEntry in DAO

    Methods in DAO that return WaitingListEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    WaitingListEntry
    WaitingListDAO.findExistingEntry(Integer userID, LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
    Checks if a specific registered user already has an active spot in the waiting list.
    WaitingListEntry
    WaitingListDAO.findExistingEntryByContact(String email, String phone, LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
    Searches for an active waiting list entry using contact details (Email or Phone).
    WaitingListEntry
    WaitingListDAO.getByConfirmationCode(int confirmationCode)
    Retrieves a waiting list entry based on its unique confirmation code.
    WaitingListEntry
    WaitingListDAO.getNextWaitingEntry()
    Returns the next customer in line (FIFO - First In, First Out).
    Methods in DAO that return types with arguments of type WaitingListEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<WaitingListEntry>
    WaitingListDAO.getWaitingEntriesWithoutExitReason()
    Retrieves all active entries currently waiting for a table.
    List<WaitingListEntry>
    WaitingListDAO.getWaitingListBetweenDates(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Fetches history of waiting list entries within a range, ordered chronologically.
    Methods in DAO with parameters of type WaitingListEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Boolean
    WaitingListDAO.addToWitingList(WaitingListEntry w)
    Adds a new customer to the waiting list.

  • Uses of WaitingListEntry in Entities

    Fields in Entities with type parameters of type WaitingListEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private List<WaitingListEntry>
    WaitingList.waitingList
    List of all entries in the waiting list.
    Methods in Entities that return types with arguments of type WaitingListEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<WaitingListEntry>
    WaitingList.getCurrentWaitingList()
    Returns the current waiting list, including only entries whose exit reason is still null (i.e., they have not yet left or been seated).
    List<WaitingListEntry>
    WaitingList.getWaitingList()
    Returns the list of all waiting list entries.
    Methods in Entities with parameters of type WaitingListEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    WaitingList.addEntryToWaitingList(WaitingListEntry waitingListEntry)
    Adds a new entry to the waiting list.
